prompt: Create a simple minimalist 3D clay-style illustration of a panda, a penguin, and a gray cat sitting side by side on a matte beige floor against a plain off-white corner wall. The scene contains exactly 3 cute rounded animals: 1 panda on the left with a white round head, black ears, black eye patches, small black nose and mouth, black arms and legs, sitting with one arm across its belly; 1 penguin in the center with a navy-black outer body, white face and belly, tiny black eyes, a small orange beak, orange feet, and flipper-like wings hanging down; 1 gray cat on the right sitting upright with pointed ears, black dot eyes, small nose and mouth, three whiskers on each side, front paws indicated by subtle lines, and a curved tail resting on the floor. Use soft plush-toy proportions, smooth rounded geometry, no outlines except simple facial marks, muted colors, gentle ambient lighting, very soft shadows, lots of empty negative space above the characters, a calm Scandinavian children’s-room aesthetic, front-facing camera at low eye level, square composition, clean and uncluttered.
